title: Import Order Matters: How to Load Split SQL Files
description: Split dumps must be imported in the right order. Here’s the safest sequence.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: If you import split files out of order, you can hit missing table or foreign key errors.

content.title: Split with order in mind
content.text: Keep your chunks aligned for clean imports.

faq.question: Can I merge chunks later?
faq.answer: Yes, but it’s usually easier to import in order.
